name: A Tale of Kings
text: [x]Discover a minion of a specific minion type. Swaps type each turn.

name: ALL Will Burn!
text: [x]Start of Combat: Give ALL minions +2 Attack permanently.

name: Adventure!
text: [x]At the start of the game, Discover a Hero Power.

name: All Patched Up
text: [x]Start the game with 30 extra Health.

name: Alternate Timeline
text: [x]On Turn 8, visit a Major Timewarp. (7 turns left!)

name: Arcane Alteration
text: [x]Replace a card with a random one of the same Tier. (Twice per turn.)

name: Arcane Knowledge
text: [x]The next Tavern spell you buy costs (1) less. (Unlocks on Turn 3.)

name: Avalanche
text: [x]After you play 3 Elementals, reduce the Cost of upgrading the Tavern by (3).

name: Avatar of N'Zoth
text: [x]Start the game with a 2/2 Fish that gains all your Deathrattles in combat.

name: Azshara's Ambition
text: [x]When your warband reaches 30 total Attack, begin your Naga Conquest.

name: BUY, INSECT!
text: [x]After you buy 16 cards, get Sulfuras. (16 left!)

name: Bananarama
text: [x]At the start of your turn, get 2 Bananas and give everyone else one.

name: Battle Brand
text: [x]After you buy 4 Battlecry minions, get a Brann Bronzebeard. (Once per game.)

name: Blessing of the Nine Frogs
text: Get a random Tavern spell.

name: Bloodbound
text: Get 2 Blood Gems. (Twice per turn.)

name: Bloodfury
text: [x]After friendly minions deal 150 damage, open a portal to the Twisting Nether! (150 left!)

name: Bob's Burgles
text: [x]Refresh the Tavern with plain copies of your last opponent's warband.

name: Boon of Light
text: Give a minion Divine Shield.

name: Brick by Brick
text: [x]Steal a random minion from the Tavern. Double its Health.

name: Broodmother
text: [x]Avenge (4): Summon a 1/1 Whelp that attacks immediately. Improve this by +1/+1.

name: Build-An-Undead
text: [x]Craft a custom Undead. (3 Creations left!)

name: Buried Treasure
text: [x] Dig for a Golden minion! (4 Digs left.)

name: Choose Your Champion

name: Clairvoyance
text: [x]Your first Refresh each turn is free.

name: Cloning Gallery
text: [x]Once per game, summon an exact copy of a friendly minion.

name: Come One, Come All!
text: [x]Darkmoon Tickets are in the Tavern! Get 3 to Discover a minion of your Tier.

name: Conviction
text: [x]Give 1 random friendly minion +1/+1. Passive: After each combat, choose an improvement.

name: Demon Hunter Training
text: [x]After 14 friendly minions attack, the first minion you buy each turn is free. (14 left!)

name: Detective for Hire
text: [x]Look at 2 minions. Guess which one your next opponent had last combat for a Tavern Coin.

name: Devour
text: [x]Sell a friendly minion. Spit its stats onto another.

name: Double Trouble
text: [x]Whenever you play a Golden minion, both you and Gall get a Triple Reward. (3 left!)

name: Double Trouble
text: [x]Whenever you play a Golden minion, both you and Cho get a Triple Reward. (3 left!)

name: Dream Portal
text: [x]The Tavern offers an extra Dragon whenever it is Refreshed.

name: Dungar's Gryphon
text: Choose a new flightpath. Complete it to get a bonus!

name: Efficient Exchange
text: Pass a non-Golden minion.

name: Embrace Your Rage
text: [x]Start of Combat: Summon and get a minion of your Tier.

name: Embrace the Elements
text: [x]Choose an Element. Start of Combat: Call upon that Element.

name: Everbloom

name: Expedition Plans

name: Glaive Ricochet

name: Gonna Be Rich!

name: Growing Collection

name: Lead Explorer
text: [x]Discover a minion from your Tier. Costs (1) more after each use.

name: Lock and Load

name: Mana Per Minute

name: Manastorm

text: [x]At the start of each turn, get a random Spellcraft spell.

text: [x]Give +1/+2 and Taunt to minions you summon during combat.
